title: paul russells 8W Oval LED Bulkhead Light – Wall Mounted Outdoor Fixture with Black Trim, IP54 Waterproof, 650LM, 6500K Daylight White, Perfect for Bathroom, Kitchen, Hallway, Garden and ceiling 1 Pack
features: Versatile Modern Design: This wall lamp features a sleek and simple design that complements various interior and exterior decor styles. It's perfect for gardens, paths, courtyards, decks, docks, boats, stairways, pavements, porches, and driveways.

Energy-Efficient LED Lighting: Save up to 90% on your electricity bill with this 10W LED light, which is a direct replacement for a 55W incandescent bulb. Enjoy long-lasting energy savings with this efficient lighting solution.

Weatherproof and Durable: Crafted from eco-friendly and durable materials, these bulkhead lights are designed to withstand the elements. They are rated IP54 weatherproof, ensuring they can endure outdoor conditions, including exposure to dust and splashing water.

Quick and Easy Installation: With its straightforward design and included screws and user guide, installing this wall lamp is a breeze. You'll have it up and running in just a few minutes, hassle-free.

Quality and Warranty: This exterior wall light is CE and ROHS certified and has an extended 5-year warranty. If you have any questions or concerns, our responsive customer service team is available 24/7 to provide a satisfying solution.
description: Product Description Package List: 1x Paul Russells LED Oval Bulkhead 1x Screw Accessory 1x Installation Guide Paul Russells LEDs where outdoor lighting becomes an art form. With meticulous design and manufacturing, we deliver unparalleled charm in every product. Elevate your space with our first-class lighting solutions. Paul Russells LED Bulkhead Outdoor Light [Without Sensor] Features : * Input: AC 200-240V 50/60Hz * Waterproof rate: IP54 * Colour Temperature: 6500K (Daylight White) * Lifespan: 25,000hrs * Ultra-thin Design Long Service & Durability Easy Wall Mount Indoor and Outdoor Use

specifications_table.Special features: ‎Durable Light, Easy Installation, Flicker Free, IP54 Protection, Up To 85% Energy Savings
